steps.title: Use elimination
steps.content:
Use the second equation $3x+4y=0$. Multiply the simplified first equation by $4$ and the second by $5$:
$$16x+20y+48=0$$
$$15x+20y=0$$
Subtract to get
$$x+48=0$$
$$x=-48$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph both equations and read the intersection, then add the coordinates. The sum is $-12$. The answer is A.
